titleStmt.title: SII 15.620: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 620. (B.K. No. 17 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Kalyāṇa-maṇḍapa of the Vīranārāyaṇa temple.
It registers a series of gifts of lands, house-sites and money, the purpose of which cannot be made out. The inscription appears to have been engraved in continuation of another.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī kalyāṇābhyudaya hariharadēvaraṁgaḍi seṭṭigo
ppalalli baḍagavāgi A sthaḷada hatti voṁdu mattaṁ seṭṭi
goppalalu baḍagavāgila gāṇada mane voṁdu mattaṁ hi
ṭṭiyagēriya muṁdaṇa kāḷpattiya baḍagivāgila maneye
raḍu mattaṁ gaggarakēriyalli mūḍala baḍagavāgila nāya
kamane hattiyeraḍu mattaṁ Akkiyaradēkabeya gaṁdagu
ḍiya hattivareya maneyuṁ baṇabe voṭṭu sahita votta
gadyāṇa haṁneraḍu
worn out
mattaṁ jāliya kāḷvattiyalli
hiṁḍiya dēciya keṟeya paḍuvaṇalli mattaru hattuma
tta muṁjiyagēriya śatada baṁṭageṟeya mūḍaṇa meyya ma
ttaroṁbhattu mattaṁ muṁjeyagēriya śatada habbasugeyalu
mattaru hadināṟu Alleyagēriya śatada lāḷara bāginalu
mattaru hattu hoḷaleyagēriya śatada hebbasugeyalli ma
ttaru nāluku mattaṁ pāṁḍavara ciddaṁṇa hoṁge tiṁgaḷiṁge yippa
ṇa vriddhiyalu koṁḍa gadyāṇa Ippattu mattaṁ gaggara māhaṇa
nuṁ mēdhāviyuṁ hoṁge tiṁgaḷiṁgippaṇa vriddhiyalu ma
duvege koṁḍa gadyāṇa voṁbhatu .
chipped off

gaggara ghaisa hoṁge tiṁgiḷiṁgippaṇa vriddhiyalu koṁḍa gadyāṇa
Aṟavaṭigegāta kuḍuva ga 2 gaggara cauḍeya ghaisa
ra maga nāgaṇa hoṁge tiṁgaḷiṁgippaṇa vriddhiyiṁ koṁḍa ga 3
Ātanaṟavaṭigeya desa[Īṁ] kuḍuva ga 1 pāṁḍavara mādhavadē
va hoṁgippaṇa vriddhiyalu koṁḍa gadyāṇa 1 paṇaveydu
chipped off
gaggara sōvaṁ
ṇa hoṁgippaṇa vriddhiyiṁ koṁḍa gadyāṇaṁ Āṟu
chipped off
Digital edition of SII 15.620 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
